twitter_thread: 75% of top AI desktop apps rely on Gemini Pro, but 90% of devs misconfigure it, losing 30% productivity.
Knackstedt's Gemini Pro Desktop app fixes this: 5x faster setup, 2x code completion rate.
Antigravity CLI's tutorial reduces Gemini 3.5 setup time from 2 hours to 10 minutes.
Most devs skip the desktop app's auto-install guide, wasting 1 hour/day on manual config.
Gemini Pro boosts productivity 40% with the right tools, like Knackstedt's app and Antigravity CLI.
What's the most efficient Gemini Pro workflow you've built?
Do you prefer Gemini Pro with a desktop app or CLI? #aiproductivity #gemini
